message:
feat(glow): Migrate error types to thiserror and add comprehensive test coverage

This commit enhances the glow markdown reader CLI with thiserror-based error
handling and extensive test coverage across all modules.

Error Handling Migration (github.rs):
- Migrate ParseError enum to thiserror with #[error] attributes
- Migrate FetchError enum to thiserror with detailed documentation
- Add recovery strategy tables for each error variant
- Add ParseResult<T> and FetchResult<T> type aliases
- Document common failure modes and recovery patterns

Browser Module (browser.rs):
- Apply rustfmt formatting for match arms and method chains
- Improve code readability in keyboard handler and file filtering
- Fix long lines in help text and markdown extension detection

Library Tests (lib.rs):
- Add style parsing tests including case insensitivity and whitespace
- Add Config builder tests for default values and chaining
- Add Config validation tests for style acceptance/rejection
- Add Reader tests for markdown rendering (basic, empty, complex)
- Add Reader file operations tests for nonexistent paths
- Add Stash tests for document collection management

E2E Test Suite (tests/e2e.rs):
- Add end-to-end tests for CLI execution
- Add test fixtures for markdown file rendering

Error Type Tests (tests/error_types.rs):
- Add tests validating thiserror integration
- Add tests for ParseError and FetchError formatting
- Add tests for error conversion and From implementations

Cargo.toml Updates:
- Add thiserror to workspace dependencies
- Add assert_cmd and predicates dev-dependencies for CLI testing
- Configure test fixtures directory

Code Formatting:
- Apply rustfmt throughout for consistent style

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+# Hello World
+
+This is a basic markdown test file.
+
+## Features
+
+- Item one
+- Item two
+- Item three
+
+Some **bold** and *italic* text.

@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+# Complex Markdown Document
+
+This document tests various markdown features.
+
+## Code Blocks
+
+```rust
+fn main() {
+    println!("Hello, world!");
+}
+```
+
+## Tables
+
+| Name | Type | Description |
+|------|------|-------------|
+| foo  | str  | A string    |
+| bar  | int  | A number    |
+
+## Blockquotes
+
+> This is a blockquote.
+> It can span multiple lines.
+
+## Links
+
+Check out [GitHub](https://github.com) for more.
+
+## Nested Lists
+
+1. First item
+   - Sub-item A
+   - Sub-item B
+2. Second item
+   1. Sub-item 1
+   2. Sub-item 2
+3. Third item
+
+## Horizontal Rule
+
+---
+
+That's all folks!
